structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm - Level 3
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
judge_reason: Fault diagnostic rule with specific conditions and alarm level.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm - Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zones with Importance-Multiplier of 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
judge_reason: Alarm suppression rule referencing another section.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Override - Cooling Damper Closed if Cooling AHU Not Proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Section 5.13.5.1 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Cooling air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
judge_reason: Operational override rule supported by evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Override - Heating Damper Closed if Heating AHU Not Proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Section 5.13.5.1 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
judge_reason: Operational override rule supported by evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan serving zone OFF AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above threshold while fan OFF for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes AND fan serving damper proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow above threshold while damper closed and fan ON for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
judge_reason: Damper leaking alarm rule with conditions.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Deadband Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at the active setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at active setpoint. Hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
judge_reason: Operational sequence directly from Guideline 36 with clear evidence quote.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Table 5.13.4 defines the active endpoints for cooling maximum, minimum, and heating maximum airflow setpoints based on Zone Group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Setpoints vary per table: Cooling maximum = Vcool-max in Occupied/Cooldown/Setup, 0 otherwise; Minimum = Vmin* in Occupied, 0 otherwise; Heating maximum = Vheat-max in Occupied/Warmup/Setback, 0 otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
evidence_text:
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
judge_reason: Parameter specification table directly from guideline.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Dual-Duct VAV
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches interlocked to system level point to force airflow setpoints and damper positions, and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
